patients: This pilot study (April 2003–August 2005) enrolled 155 adult patients with various solid tumors (predominantly renal cell carcinoma) to evaluate ⁹⁹ᵐTc-EC20, an FR-targeted imaging agent. Of 154 evaluable patients, 68% had EC20-positive tumors (mild/marked uptake), with 61% agreement with IHC (FRα detection, κ=0.096) and better positive result alignment (72%). endpoint_period: Whole body scans and blood sampling are performed at 15–45 min, 3–6 hrs, 1, 3–4 and 6 days after injection of 111In-ibritumomab tiuxetan on day -7; radiation absorbed doses are calculated promptly to assess exposure before 90Y-ibritumomab tiuxetan administration
purpose: To investigate the radiation exposure (to normal organs, whole body, and red marrow) of patients with advanced-stage follicular lymphoma receiving 90Y-ibritumomab tiuxetan as consolidation therapy, and to explore the correlation between radiation dose and hematologic toxicity

security_indicators: Radiation absorbed doses to normal organs (≤2000 cGy), whole body (median 74 cGy) and red marrow (median 102 cGy, mostly ≤300 cGy)
adverse_events_summary: No correlation was found between WB/RM doses and hematologic toxicity.Some patients developed grade 0–4 neutropenia and/or thrombocytopenia
